# Handler Patterns Reference

All handlers MUST call `await next?.handle(request)` to preserve the chain.

## Init Handler
Runs once when page loads. Use for: initial calculations, loading extra data, setting defaults.

```javascript
{
    request: "crt.HandleViewModelInitRequest",
    handler: async (request, next) => {
        const statusValue = await request.$context.PDS.UsrStatus;
        request.$context.IsEditable = statusValue?.displayValue !== "Closed";
        await next?.handle(request);
    }
}
```

## Attribute Change Handler
Runs when any bound attribute changes. Always check `request.attributeName`.

```javascript
{
    request: "crt.HandleViewModelAttributeChangeRequest",
    handler: async (request, next) => {
        if (request.attributeName === "PDS.UsrType") {
            const typeValue = await request.$context.PDS.UsrType;
            // Visibility rule
            request.$context.IsVacationFieldVisible =
                typeValue?.displayValue === "Vacation";
            // Auto-calculate
            request.$context.PDS.UsrCategory = typeValue?.value;
        }
        await next?.handle(request);
    }
}
```

### Multiple Attribute Watches
```javascript
{
    request: "crt.HandleViewModelAttributeChangeRequest",
    handler: async (request, next) => {
        if (request.attributeName === "PDS.UsrQuantity" ||
            request.attributeName === "PDS.UsrPrice") {
            const qty = await request.$context.PDS.UsrQuantity;
            const price = await request.$context.PDS.UsrPrice;
            request.$context.PDS.UsrTotal = (qty || 0) * (price || 0);
        }
        await next?.handle(request);
    }
}
```

## Save Handler
Runs before record save. Use for: pre-save validation, post-save actions.

```javascript
{
    request: "crt.SaveRecordRequest",
    handler: async (request, next) => {
        const name = await request.$context.PDS.UsrName;
        if (!name || name.trim() === "") {
            request.$context.showWarningDialog("Name is required");
            return;
        }
        await next?.handle(request);
    }
}
```

## Destroy Handler
Runs when page is destroyed. Use for: cleanup, unsubscribing.

```javascript
{
    request: "crt.HandleViewModelDestroyRequest",
    handler: async (request, next) => {
        // Cleanup logic here
        await next?.handle(request);
    }
}
```

## Open Page Handler
Navigate to another page programmatically.

```javascript
{
    request: "crt.OpenPageRequest",
    handler: async (request, next) => {
        if (request.schemaName === "UsrTargetPage_FormPage") {
            request.recordId = someRecordId;
        }
        await next?.handle(request);
    }
}
```

## Custom Request Handler
Define and handle custom requests for reusable logic.

```javascript
// Handler definition
{
    request: "usr.CalculateTotalRequest",
    handler: async (request, next) => {
        const subtotal = await request.$context.PDS.UsrSubtotal;
        const tax = subtotal * 0.2;
        request.$context.PDS.UsrTax = tax;
        request.$context.PDS.UsrTotal = subtotal + tax;
        await next?.handle(request);
    }
}
```

Trigger from button:
```json
{
    "type": "crt.Button",
    "caption": "Calculate",
    "clicked": { "request": "usr.CalculateTotalRequest" }
}
```

## Handler Request Types Summary

| Request | Trigger |
|---------|---------|
| `crt.HandleViewModelInitRequest` | Page load |
| `crt.HandleViewModelAttributeChangeRequest` | Field value change |
| `crt.SaveRecordRequest` | Record save |
| `crt.HandleViewModelDestroyRequest` | Page close |
| `crt.OpenPageRequest` | Page navigation |
| `crt.HandleStageChangeRequest` | Pipeline stage change |
| `usr.*` | Custom (user-defined) |
